name: Major Campaign Matchday
description: Premium matchday announcement for UEFA Major Campaign fixtures. Features enhanced CL branding, starball elements, and elevated production quality.

subheadline.example: The biggest night of the season under the Main Venue lights

guidelines: This is a premium template — production value must exceed standard matchday content. Use the CL deep navy background (#001B3D). The starball must appear as an animated element. CL anthem snippet (3-5 seconds) as the audio intro. Club crests should be displayed at CL quality standards. Opponent crest must be high resolution. Video format preferred for the anthem integration.
